name: JoAi: Update Contact

description.en: Edit an existing contact's details such as name, email, phone, company, or tags. Keep your address book up to date so your AI agent always has the latest information for personalized communication.
description.de: Bearbeite die Details eines bestehenden Kontakts wie Name, E-Mail, Telefon, Firma oder Tags. Halte dein Adressbuch aktuell, damit dein KI-Agent immer die neuesten Infos für personalisierte Kommunikation hat.
description.es: Edit an existing contact's details such as name, email, phone, company, or tags. Keep your address book up to date so your AI agent always has the latest information for personalized communication.
description.fr: Edit an existing contact's details such as name, email, phone, company, or tags. Keep your address book up to date so your AI agent always has the latest information for personalized communication.
description.ro: Edit an existing contact's details such as name, email, phone, company, or tags. Keep your address book up to date so your AI agent always has the latest information for personalized communication.
description.it: Edit an existing contact's details such as name, email, phone, company, or tags. Keep your address book up to date so your AI agent always has the latest information for personalized communication.

bot: Help the user update a contact's details. If the user refers to a contact by name, list contacts first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Contact ID

description.en: The ID of the contact to update
description.de: Die ID des zu aktualisierenden Kontakts
description.es: The ID of the contact to update
description.fr: The ID of the contact to update
description.ro: The ID of the contact to update
description.it: The ID of the contact to update

inputs.bot: The contact hash ID. If the user refers to a contact by name, list contacts first to find the matching ID.
A new name for this contact, if they want to rename it.

description.en: Social media profiles as a JSON array
description.es: Social media profiles as a JSON array
description.fr: Social media profiles as a JSON array
description.ro: Social media profiles as a JSON array
description.it: Social media profiles as a JSON array

description.en: Replace all tags with this set (use tagsAppend to merge with existing)
description.de: Alle Tags mit dieser Liste ersetzen (für Merge mit bestehenden Tags tagsAppend verwenden)
description.es: Replace all tags with this set (use tagsAppend to merge with existing)
description.fr: Replace all tags with this set (use tagsAppend to merge with existing)
description.ro: Replace all tags with this set (use tagsAppend to merge with existing)
description.it: Replace all tags with this set (use tagsAppend to merge with existing)

inputs.name: Tags Append

description.en: Tags to add without removing existing ones
description.de: Tags hinzufügen ohne bestehende zu entfernen
description.es: Tags to add without removing existing ones
description.fr: Tags to add without removing existing ones
description.ro: Tags to add without removing existing ones

inputs.bot: Tags to add to the contact without removing existing ones. Pass as a JSON array of strings.
